pr_text:
## Title: Fix MBMS RLC timer configuration violating 3GPP timing requirements

### Summary
The `rrc_M2AP_init_MBMS` function in the LTE RRC module incorrectly configures RLC timer parameters for MBMS bearers. The timer values were set to 0 (disabled) when 3GPP specifications require them to be enabled for proper MBMS operation. This misconfiguration violates protocol timing requirements and can cause MBMS session establishment failures. Additionally, the security mode parameter was incorrectly s
